## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run lint`
- [ ] I ran `npm test`
- [ ] I ran `npm run build`
- [ ] I tested the feature in the browser
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or a short screen recording if the UI changed.

## Peer Review Notes

- What should reviewers focus on?
- Are there any questions or trade-offs?
